## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Related issue

Closes #<issue-number> (if applicable)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Other (describe):

## How was this tested?

Describe how you verified the change (manual steps, routes exercised, etc.).

## Checklist

- [ ] `python manage.py check` passes with no new errors
- [ ] Added/updated migrations for any model changes (`python manage.py makemigrations`)
- [ ] No secrets, `db.sqlite3`, `.env`, or `media/` files committed
- [ ] Updated README/docs if behavior or routes changed
- [ ] Follows existing code and template style
- [ ] PR is focused on a single logical change

## Screenshots (if UI change)

Add before/after screenshots, including mobile if the layout changed.
